---
ID: US-CMP-FE-312
Title: Reviewer decision modals and creator feedback display
Status: Done
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-25
Ticket: CMP-FE-312
Epic: CMP-E3: Review Queue and Approval Integrity
---

As a reviewer and creator
I want clear decision prompts and stored rejection context so revision loops are fast.
So content quality improves without ambiguity.

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Reject modal requires reason before submit.
- [ ] Approve and reject actions show loading lock to prevent duplicate submissions.
- [ ] Rejection reason displays on creator draft detail.
- [ ] Creator gets notification record if notifications are enabled.
- [ ] Decision actions are reflected in activity timeline.
